content.title: Review spec: cap-upward-promotion
content.description:
Review the draft spec at .agentic/specs/cap-upward-promotion-spec.md

Analyze viability against the actual codebase. Comment with:
- Feasibility issues
- Missing edge cases
- Suggested API changes
- Implementation concerns

Do NOT implement — only analyze and comment.

content.content: Spec review complete. Viable and well-scoped. Key findings: (1) Reparenting path also affected - not mentioned in spec but covered implicitly since same function is used. (2) Reason message format needs specification. (3) When parent is already at in-progress and child goes to done, no promotion event is emitted at all since capped status equals current. (4) 7 tests need updating across hierarchy and tracker hierarchy test files. (5) No changes needed to any other module. Complexity is low - about 5 lines of code change.
